lines.text: Central Perk, Phoebe and Monica are there as Joey is entering excitedly.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey! You guys! You're not gonna believe this! I just got off the phone with my agent...

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh my God! (Joey looks at her.) I'm sorry, too soon. You go.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay. I got nominated for my part on Days of Our Lives!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Joey!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Good for you!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Congratulations! Wow! I can't believe you're nominated for an Emmy!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No-no.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh Soap Opera Digest award!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No! I'm up for a Soapie!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Honey? Is that something you're making up?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No, no, no! It's real! And it has been since 1998. (Rachel returns from the bathroom.) Hey Rach! Rach! I'm up for a Soapie!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (gasps) Oh my God! Oh my God!! That is like the third most prestigious soap opera award there is!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Thank you! Well, I guess now I know who I'm taking to the awards. (Points to Rachel.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, stop that! Don't kid about that! (Gasps) Will all the stars be there?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Many are scheduled to appear.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh my God! Oh my God! I can't go! I'm gonna be too nervous!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (to Joey) Okay, I'll go!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No!! You are getting married! This is all I have.
Opening Credits
N.Y.U, Ross is giving a lecture.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: ...and it was Ernst Muhlbrat who first hypothesized that the Velociraptor would expand it's collar and emit a high pitched noise to frighten it's predator. (A student raises his hand.) Yes Mr. Lewis?

lines.speaker: Lewis
lines.text: What kinda noise?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Just a high pitched intimidating noise.

lines.speaker: Lewis
lines.text: But like how?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well we-we don't know for sure. But in my head it-it sounded something like this. (He makes a high pitched noise and Alan doesn't know what to make of it.) Of course, this is just conjecture. Okay, that's uh, that's all for today. (Everyone starts to get up.) Uh Mr. Morse, can I see you for a moment?

lines.speaker: Morse
lines.text: Yes sir.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Mr. Morse I need to talk to you about your mid-term exam, I'm afraid I-I had to fail you.

lines.speaker: Morse
lines.text: (shocked) Why?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well you need 60% to pass...

lines.speaker: Morse
lines.text: What'd I get?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Seven.

lines.speaker: Morse
lines.text: That's not so good.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No-no it's not. What-what happened there Ned?

lines.speaker: Morse
lines.text: Well maybe you can cut me some slack. I'm sort of in love.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well I'm sorry but, that-that's really not my problem.

lines.speaker: Morse
lines.text: I'm in love with you.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well that brings me in the loop a little.

lines.speaker: Morse
lines.text: You see, that's why I did so bad on this test. I'm having a hard time concentrating. When you're up there (Points to the podium) and you're teaching and your face gets all serious...you look so good. (In a sexy voice) You wear that tight little turtleneck sweater...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay! (Walks away from him.) Umm, I uh, I'm your teacher. I'm sorry, you're-you're a student and I-and I like women. In spite of what may be written on the backs of some of these chairs.
Central Perk, Monica and Phoebe are drinking coffee and Phoebe notices a cute guy checking them out.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh my God! That guy at the counter is totally checking you out!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Really? (Looks.) My God, he's really cute.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Go for it.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Phoebe, I'm engaged!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I'm just saying, get his number just in case. But no Chandler is in an accident and can't perform sexually and he would want you to take a lover to satisfy the needs that he can no longer fulfill.

lines.speaker: The Cute Guy
lines.text: (To Monica) Hi!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Op, can I just tell you something? Very flattered but umm, I'm engaged. (Points to her ring.)

lines.speaker: The Cute Guy
lines.text: Wow! Uh, this is kind of embarrassing. I was actually coming over to talk to your friend.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well you should be embarrassed. (Leaves.)

lines.speaker: The Cute Guy
lines.text: (To Phoebe) I thought you knew I was looking at you.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I did, but that was really fun.
Joey and Rachel's, Joey is sitting in the chair.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (pretending to be an announcer) And the winner is...Joey Tribbiani! (He then gets excited and goes over to the counter to practice his acceptance speech using a bottle of maple syrup as the award.) Oh... Wow! I honestly never expected this. I uh, I didn't prepare a speech. But umm, I'd like to thank (Rachel enters quietly) my parents, who've always been there for me. I'd also like to thank my friends, Chandler, Monica, Phoebe, Rachel...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I'm fourth! (Joey is startled.) Look at you with your little maple syrup award!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah may-maybe you don't tell anyone about this.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What? No! It's not a big deal! I do that too, with my shampoo bottle.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Really?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: What award are you practicing for?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Grammy, Best New Artist.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, hey listen! The Soapie's called today and I also get to present an award.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ohh that's great!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: So you'll definitely get onstage, even if you don't win.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (confused) What you-you don't think I'm gonna win?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well of course I do! But y'know, favorite returning character is a tough category Joey. I mean you're up against the guy who survived his own cremation.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah. No-no I-I know I might not win, but it's just...I've never even been nominated before! I want it so much.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well Joey, you'll probably get it. But you should probably your-your gracious loser face. Y'know when like the cameras are on you and you wanna look disappointed but also that your colleague deserved to win. Y'know? So it's sorta like... (Does it, you'll have to see it.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey! (Likes it.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Y'know?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: You practice losing the Grammies too?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh no, at the Grammies I always win.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ah.
Monica's Restaurant Kitchen, she's cooking as Phoebe enters.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh hey!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey! How'd your date go with Jake?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, great! We couldn't keep our eyes off each other all night and then every once and a while y'know, he'd kinda lean over and stroke my hair and touch my neck. (Does that to Monica.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay, stop it Phoebe, you're getting me all tingly.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (laughs) All I could think of was y'know, "Is he gonna kiss me? Is he gonna kiss me?"

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: And did he?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I'm a lady Monica, I don't kiss and tell. But this hickey speaks for itself. (She starts to open up her blouse.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay-okay, I got it. I got it.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I just like him so much that I just feel like I've had 10 drinks today and I've only had six.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, I haven't had that feeling since I first started going out with Chandler. Wow, I'm never gonna have that feeling again am I?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You sound like a guy.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No, a guy would be saying, "I'm never gonna get to sleep with anyone else." Oh my God! I'm never gonna get to sleep with anyone else! I've been so busy planning the wedding that I forgot about all the things that I'd be giving up! I mean, I...I'm never gonna have a first kiss again.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You'll have a last kiss.
Joey and Rachel's, Ross is helping Joey with his tie.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Can I ask you something? Have you ever had a guy have a crush on you?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Is that why you wanted to tie my tie?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: There's this kid in my class who said he's in love with me.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Whoa!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (entering from her room) Whoa what?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ross has a boyfriend.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I do-I do not have a boyfriend. There's a guy in one of my classes who-who has a crush on me.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Really?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah! I don't know. I mean, last year Elizabeth now-now this kid. What-what-what-what is it?! Am I giving out some kind of...sexy professor vibe? (Rachel and Joey both look at him.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Not right now.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: It-it-The point is my natural charisma has made him fail his midterm.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, see now I feel bad for the kid! I had a crush on a teacher once and it was so hard! Y'know you-I couldn't concentrate and I blushed every time he looked at me. I mean come on, you remember what's it's like to be 19 and in love.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah. I guess I can cut him some slack.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: How'd you get over that teacher?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I didn't. I got under him.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (To Ross) Problem solved.
Central Perk, Phoebe is saying good-bye to her boyfriend Jake at the door to Central Perk.

lines.speaker: Jake
lines.text: Bye Phoebe.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay bye. (They kiss.)

lines.speaker: Jake
lines.text: All right. Bye. (Backs out the door.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Bye! (Phoebe goes over and joins Monica on the couch.) We said good-bye at the door so as not to flaunt our new love.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Phoebe, it's okay. You don't have to tip toe around me. I-I've been thinking about it and umm, y'know what? I'm okay about not having that new relationship feeling...

lines.speaker: Jake
lines.text: (yelling through the window to Phoebe) I miss you already!!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (yelling back) I miss you too!!!! (He walks away.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: See? That's what I mean. I mean that, that's great! But I wouldn't trade in what I have for that. I mean I'm gonna be with Chandler for the rest of my life, and that's what makes me happy. (Chandler approaches.) Hey sweetie, come here! Come sit down. Hey Phoebe and I were just talking about how our relationship is deep and meaningful. It really is don't you think?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh totally! (Holds up his finger.) Pull my finger.
The 2001 Soapie Awards, Joey's category is up next and the presenter walks to the podium.

lines.speaker: Announcer
lines.text: Presenting the award for Favorite Returning Male Character is McKensize...
[Cut to Joey and Rachel's table.]

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (To Rachel) This is it! This is my category.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I know! My God! Do you have your speech?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, I got my speech!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Do you got your gracious loser face?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah. (Does it.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Now Joey remember, if you win you have to hug me! You hug me!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay. Can I squeeze your ass?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: On TV?! Yeah!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: 'Kay!
[Cut to the presenter.]

lines.speaker: The Presenter
lines.text: ...in the category of Favorite Returning Male Character the nominees are: John Wheeler from General Hospital (Applause), Gavin Grant from The Young and the Restless (Applause), Dunkin Harrington from Passions (Applause), and Joey Tribbiani from Days of Our Lives (Applause). And the Soapie goes to...(She opens the envelope)...Gavin Grant from The Young and the Restless!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: What the?! (Joey pounds the table and starts yelling at Rachel, and which is drowned out by applause. Rachel is desperately trying to tell Joey that he's on TV right now. He finally notices and he does his gracious loser face.)
Commercial Break
The 2001 Soapie Awards, the announcer is introducing the next presenter.

lines.speaker: Announcer
lines.text: Presenting the award for Favorite Supporting Actress is Joey Tribbiani from Days of Our Lives. (Applause as Joey angrily walks to the podium and eyes the trophy.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (angrily and monotone) Any one of the brilliant actresses nominated for this award tonight deserves to take it home. Unfortunately only one can. (Shakes his head in disgust.) The nominees for Best Supporting Actress are from Passions Erin Goff. (There is applause, which Joey disgustedly waits to dye out.) From One Life to Live Mary Loren Bishop (They start to applaud again, but Joey interrupts in with the rest of the nominees), from All My Children Sarah Mchann, and from Days of Our Lives Jessica Ashley. And the winner is...(Opens the envelope)...Jessica Ashley from Days of Our Lives. (Applause) Uh, unfortunately Jessica couldn't be with us tonight so I'll be accepting this award on her behalf. (Realizes something) And I'm sure that Jessica would like to thank my parents who always believed in me. She'd also like to thank my friends, Chandler, Monica, Ross, Phoebe, and Rachel who's sittin' right there! (Points at Rachel.) (The music starts and his microphone is turned off, this angers Joey again and he disgustedly exits.)
Joey and Rachel's, Joey and Rachel are entering.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Joey! Why did we have to rush out of there so fast?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Rach we had to get out of there because, look what I won! (He whips out the award for Best Supporting Actress that he accepted for Jessica.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh my God you stole her award!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No-no! No, I'm accepting it on her behalf. (He puts it up above the TV to display it.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Joey I don't think you know what behalf means.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Sure I do! It's a verb! As in, "I behalfin' it!"

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Joey, you have got to take this back!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: But why?! I should've won one and I really want it and she didn't even care enough to come to the thing! It could also be a Grammy.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (looking at the award) No! Joey!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Come on Rach! No one saw me take it! There was a whole table full of 'em.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Do you really want an award you didn't win?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No! I want an award I did win! But nobody's giving me any of those! Plus-Hey Rach, if-if I put it up there (Points to the TV) right? When people come over they'll see it and they'll think I won it.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Joey is says Best Supporting Actress!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I can scratch that right off.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Joey no, this is wrong! You have to take it back, okay? You don't want to win an award this way. You're very talented. And someday you're gonna win one of these for real and that one is gonna mean something.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: All right!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: All right? (He sets the award down.) Thank you.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I'll take it back tomorrow.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Thank you.
He goes into his room and closes the door. Rachel goes to pick it up and...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (opening his door) If I can't have it you can't have it! (Rachel walks away angrily.)
Ross's Classroom, he is writing on the board and Alan is coming in to see him.

lines.speaker: Lewis
lines.text: Professor Geller?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (turning towards him) Yes Mr. Lewis, how can I help you?

lines.speaker: Lewis
lines.text: I know I didn't do well on my midterms and stuff but, I was kinda hoping you could change my grade.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: And why exactly would I do that? (Goes back to writing on the board.)

lines.speaker: Lewis
lines.text: Because I'm in love with you.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (turning around and dragging the chalk down the board) What?!

lines.speaker: Lewis
lines.text: Yeah, I'm all...in love with you and stuff. So could you change my grade?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No!

lines.speaker: Lewis
lines.text: Well why not you changed Ned's grade!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well that's different! Okay? Because he, he was actually in love with me!

lines.speaker: Lewis
lines.text: No he's not! He's totally yanking your chain! He's done this with three other teachers!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Lewis
lines.text: He's got a girlfriend!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I can't believe someone would do that for a grade.

lines.speaker: Lewis
lines.text: I know! It's awful. I love you.
Ross glares at him.
Central Perk, Phoebe is sitting on the couch as Monica enters.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Have you seen Chandler?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No. Why?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: 'Cause I just keeping thinking about all these things that I'm not gonna have and it's freaking me out. I don't know what to do about it.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay, don't sweat it. (Looking around her.) Chandler is nowhere around so go ahead get it out of your system. That guy's cute. (Points to a guy sitting behind Monica.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Phoebe! Come on I'm serious! I just got to talk to him about all this.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No that is the last thing you want to do!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Because you're marrying him!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You gotta help me out here Pheebs.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: All right, I've never been engaged and I've never really been married, but I can only tell you what my mother told me. Whenever you have doubts or fears or anxieties about a relationship, do not communicate them to your husband.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: So I'm not supposed to share my doubts and fears with the guy I'm gonna spend the rest of my life with?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: That is correct! Yes, you're supposed to take all of that stuff and put it in a little box in your mind and then lock it up tight.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Your mother told you this?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yes!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: The woman that got married a bunch of times and killed herself when you were 13?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh my God! You're right! Go! (Monica starts to leave.) Go tell Chandler! Hurry before it's too late! Wait no! (Monica stops.) Does this also mean putting out doesn't get you love? (Monica is shocked.)
Silvercup Studios, Joey and Rachel are there to give Jessica her award.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I cannot believe I'm gonna meet Jessica Ashley!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay wait-wait p-please be cool! Okay? I work with this woman.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay, I'm totally cool! (She coolly knocks on the door)

lines.speaker: Jessica Ashley
lines.text: Come in.
The enter.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey Jessica.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (coolly) Hey Jess.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ah, this is my friend Rachel.

lines.speaker: Jessica Ashley
lines.text: Hi.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: 'Sup? (Joey glares at her.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Uh listen, here's your Soapie. I accepted it for ya. (Hands it to her.)

lines.speaker: Jessica Ashley
lines.text: (shocked) Oh my God! I won! Do you have any idea what this means?! (She rolls her eyes and throws it onto the couch.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well, that-that-that's it? You're gonna, you're gonna put it on your self or anything?

lines.speaker: Jessica Ashley
lines.text: No, I try to save that for real awards. Now, if you'll excuse me. (She exits.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (To Rachel) Take it back?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Absolutely.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Y-y-yeah! (As they start to leave, Rachel pauses and steals a vase with flowers in it.) Yeah you do. (They exit.)
Monica and Chandler's, Monica is talking to Chandler.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Honey, as we get closer to the wedding, is there anything that you would like to talk about or share?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay. Well, I think the centerpieces are too big

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You're wrong! The centerpieces are fine! Do you ever get scared at all?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Kinda. They're really big.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Doesn't it ever just freak you out that-that you're never gonna be with anybody new again?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Just, I love you so much. Just...It's just sometimes it bothers me that I'm never gonna have that feeling. Y'know when you meet someone for the first time and it's new and exciting? Y'know that rush?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No. No, see when I first meet somebody it's uh it's mostly panic, anxiety, and a great deal of sweating.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay, but all right you're a guy, does it not freak you that you're never gonna sleep with anybody else?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Sleeping with somebody new, anxiety, panic, and I'm afraid even more sweating.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Even with me?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I was dangerously dehydrated during the first six months of our relationship. (Monica laughs.) Look, for me the rush is knowing that we are gonna be together for the rest of our lives.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Really?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well yeah! But now that I know that you're having these thoughts, I'm back to panic, anxiety, and uh I'm definitely gonna need some kind of sports drink.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Come here! Come here! (They hug.) Sweetie you don't have to worry. No, besides y'know what? I'm gonna have a lot of new things with you. The first time we buy a house. Our first kid. Our first grandkid...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (hoarsely) Water! Water! Water!
Ross's classroom, he has just finished his lecture and the students are filing out.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Uh Mr. Morse, can I speak to you for a moment?

lines.speaker: Morse
lines.text: (walking up) That was a great lecture today. Did you get a little hair cut?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Uh-hmm, yeah-yeah do you like it? Do-do you looove it? I just want you to know that I'm changing your grade back.

lines.speaker: Morse
lines.text: What?! Why?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: 'Cause I know what you're trying to pull here. Okay? It's not gonna work.

lines.speaker: Morse
lines.text: I'm not trying to pull anything. Look I love you dude.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Y'know what? I-I'm not even gonna talk about this. Okay? This little thing is over. I know you have a girlfriend! Okay-(Ned looks shocked)-Yeah! And I know about the other professors! How do you think that makes me feel Ned?! You used me! You don't love me and you never did! (Ross turns around to make a grand exit but runs into two colleagues.) Ah Professor Winston, Professor Fredrickson, I'll be right with you. (To Ned) Don't make this worse and I'll give you a C. (To the professors) Shall we? (They leave.)
Ending Credits
Joey and Rachel's, Phoebe is entering.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Rach?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I'll be out in a second.
Phoebe notices the Soapie on the counter.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh. (Picks it up.) It's just so unexpected! I...I uh...Boy I'll tell you it's just such an honor to be nominated for a Nobel Prize and y'know to win one for a massage. Especially after having just won a Tony award for best actress in...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (entering from her room) Honey, we have to go. Our reservations are at 8:00.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: ...in Reservations at 8:00 by Neil Simon. (To an imaginary Neil Simon) Thank-thank you Neil. Thank you for the words. (Blows him a kiss.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay honey, you can finish this later we're gonna be late. We gotta go.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Please, don't play the music. Just uh one more. LIVE FROM NEW YORK! IT'S SATURDAY NIGHT!!
End
